title: Simple Project Gantt Chart Creator
scenario: Create a basic Gantt chart for a project with three tasks and three milestones. The chart should include a header with the project name and a timeline with the tasks and milestones. The output should be a formatted text string.
constraints: Use a standard font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Gantt chart meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the tasks and milestones are clear and specific.
Assess the overall formatting of the Gantt chart, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
